description: A3 Mercados S.A. operates as a market for negotiable securities in Argentina and internationally. It offers financial and agricultural instruments, including spot, derivatives, and OTC transactions; guaranteed spot PPT; over the counter registration A3; and surety rate futures. The company also provides primary placements, secondary spot trading, and foreign exchange market; and FCI market and warrants, as well as futures and options for financial, agricultural, metals, and energy. In addition, it offers compensation and liquidation of contracts; and software programs services. A3 Mercados S.A. is based in Rosario, Argentina.
